phase-plan.purpose: Add reusable stat defaults and explicit cross-namespace inheritance for schema handoff.
phase-plan.scope: Introduce a `combatstats` model with default stats, make `entity.base` and `item.base` extend it, reflect explicit inheritance in generated schema files, show model descriptions via per-model info actions, and relabel Feature Refs as Stats.

file.description: Runtime schema normalization, inheritance resolution, model tree info actions, and stats terminology updates.
